testing_centers.notes: Objective Tests (OTQs) available on-demand at Pearson VUE test centers. Case Study exams offered in February, May, August, and November windows only.

id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match CIMA registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No personal materials permitted. On-screen calculator provided for Objective Tests. Case Study exams include pre-seen material released approximately 6 weeks before sitting. No phones or electronic devices.
renewal_options: Passed exams do not expire. Once qualified as CGMA, annual CPD is required to maintain membership. Annual subscription fee required to maintain active CIMA/CGMA status.

prerequisites.description: Must pass all three Operational level Objective Tests (E1, P1, F1)

retake_policy.notes: Maximum 3 attempts per exam per year for Objective Tests (on-demand). Case Study exams: limited to sitting windows (Feb/May/Aug/Nov); maximum 3 attempts per exam per year. Full exam fee required for each retake.

official_study_resources.title: CIMA Study Resources and Past Papers
official_study_resources.notes: Free practice tests, study guides, and past case study pre-seen materials
